rawAssistant: A good trainer knows when to push and when to hold back, respecting the bonds between trainers and their companions. I've seen too many trainers who forget that strength is not just about fighting, but also about knowing when to yield. The resolve of a true trainer is tested by the weight of loyalty and trust they've built with those they train.
